languages.text: "Это лишь передышка. Ветхий ксенос не забывает. Он вернется за вами. Вы нажили могущественного врага, {name}". {n}Себериан усмехается.{/n} "Но на закате жизни именно врагами смеряется слава прожитых дней".

"This is but a reprieve. That decrepit xenos does not forget. He will come back for you. You have made a powerful enemy, {name}." {n}Seberian lets out a dry chuckle.{/n} "But by our enemies is the glory of our lives measured, at the end of it all."
languages.original_text: "Это лишь передышка. Ветхий ксенос не забывает. Он вернется за вами. Вы нажили могущественного врага, {name}". {n}Себериан усмехается.{/n} "Но на закате жизни именно врагами смеряется слава прожитых дней".

traits.locale_text: "This is but a reprieve. That decrepit xenos does not forget. He will come back for you. You have made a powerful enemy, {name}." {n}Seberian lets out a dry chuckle.{/n} "But by our enemies is the glory of our lives measured, at the end of it all."

"This is but a reprieve. That decrepit xenos does not forget. He will come back for you. You have made a powerful enemy, {name}." {n}Seberian lets out a dry chuckle.{/n} "But by our enemies is the glory of our lives measured, at the end of it all."

"This is but a reprieve. That decrepit xenos does not forget. He will come back for you as he came for me. You have made a mighty enemy, {name}. But by our enemies is the glory of our lives measured."

"This is but a reprieve. That decrepit xenos does not forget. He will come back for you. You have made a powerful enemy, {name}." {n}Seberian lets out a dry chuckle.{/n} "But by our enemies is the glory of our lives measured, at the end of it all."

"This is but a reprieve. That decrepit xenos does not forget. He will come back for you. You have made a powerful enemy, {name}." {n}Seberian lets out a dry chuckle.{/n} "But by our enemies is the glory of our lives measured, at the end of it all."

languages.text: 「これは一時的な猶予に過ぎない。その老いた異種族は決して忘れない。彼は私を襲ったように、あなたも襲うだろう。あなたは強力な敵を作った、{name}。しかし、我々の敵こそが我々の栄光を測るものだ」
languages.original_text: "This is but a reprieve. That decrepit xenos does not forget. He will come back for you as he came for me. You have made a mighty enemy, {name}. But by our enemies is the glory of our lives measured."

traits.locale_text: 「これは一時的な猶予に過ぎない。その老いた異種族は決して忘れない。彼は私を襲ったように、あなたも襲うだろう。あなたは強力な敵を作った、{name}。しかし、我々の敵こそが我々の栄光を測るものだ。」

languages.text: «Esto no es más que una tregua. Ese xenos decrépito nunca olvida. Volverá a por usted. Ha hecho un poderoso enemigo, {name}». {n}Seberian suelta una risita seca.{/n} «Pero, en el fondo, son nuestros enemigos los que sirven para medir la gloria de nuestras vidas».
languages.original_text: "This is but a reprieve. That decrepit xenos does not forget. He will come back for you. You have made a powerful enemy, {name}." {n}Seberian lets out a dry chuckle.{/n} "But by our enemies is the glory of our lives measured, at the end of it all."

traits.locale_text: «Esto no es más que una tregua. Ese xenos decrépito nunca olvida. Volverá a por usted. Ha hecho un poderoso enemigo, {name}». {n}Seberian suelta una risita seca.{/n} «Pero, en el fondo, son nuestros enemigos los que sirven para medir la gloria de nuestras vidas».

languages.text: "Das ist nur eine Atempause. Dieser klapprige Xenos vergisst nicht. Er wird zurückkehren. Ihr habt Euch einen mächtigen Feind gemacht, {name}." {n}Seberian stößt ein trockenes Lachen aus.{/n} "Aber an unseren Gegnern bemisst sich am Ende der Ruhm unseres Lebens."
languages.original_text: "This is but a reprieve. That decrepit xenos does not forget. He will come back for you. You have made a powerful enemy, {name}." {n}Seberian lets out a dry chuckle.{/n} "But by our enemies is the glory of our lives measured, at the end of it all."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist nur eine Atempause. Dieser klapprige Xenos vergisst nicht. Er wird zurückkehren. Ihr habt Euch einen mächtigen Feind gemacht, {name}." {n}Seberian stößt ein trockenes Lachen aus.{/n} "Aber an unseren Gegnern bemisst sich am Ende der Ruhm unseres Lebens."

languages.text: « Ce n'est qu'un simple répit. Ce xénos décrépit n'est pas du genre à oublier. Il reviendra vous chercher. Vous vous êtes fait un ennemi redoutable, {name}. {n}Seberian pousse un petit rire cassant.{/n} Mais au bout du compte, notre gloire ne se mesure qu'à l'aune de nos adversaires les plus abjects. »
languages.original_text: "This is but a reprieve. That decrepit xenos does not forget. He will come back for you. You have made a powerful enemy, {name}." {n}Seberian lets out a dry chuckle.{/n} "But by our enemies is the glory of our lives measured, at the end of it all."

traits.locale_text: « Ce n'est qu'un simple répit. Ce xénos décrépit n'est pas du genre à oublier. Il reviendra vous chercher. Vous vous êtes fait un ennemi redoutable, {name}. {n}Seberian pousse un petit rire cassant.{/n} Mais au bout du compte, notre gloire ne se mesure qu'à l'aune de nos adversaires les plus abjects. »

languages.text: “这不过是暂时的喘息。那个腐朽的异形从不遗忘。他迟早会回来找你的。你招惹了一个强大的敌人，{name}。”{n}塞贝里安发出一声干笑。{/n}“但说到底，正是我们的敌人，丈量着我们一生的荣光。”
languages.original_text: "This is but a reprieve. That decrepit xenos does not forget. He will come back for you. You have made a powerful enemy, {name}." {n}Seberian lets out a dry chuckle.{/n} "But by our enemies is the glory of our lives measured, at the end of it all."

traits.locale_text: “这不过是暂时的喘息。那个腐朽的异形从不遗忘。他迟早会回来找你的。你招惹了一个强大的敌人，{name}。”{n}塞贝里安发出一声干笑。{/n}“但说到底，正是我们的敌人，丈量着我们一生的荣光。”

languages.text: "Bir mühlet için. O köhne zeno unutmaz. Peşine düşecektir. Güçlü bir düşman edindin {name}." {n}Seberian, kuru bir kahkaha atıyor.{/n} "Fakat en nihayetinde hayatımızın şanı, düşmanlarımızla ölçülür."
languages.original_text: "This is but a reprieve. That decrepit xenos does not forget. He will come back for you. You have made a powerful enemy, {name}." {n}Seberian lets out a dry chuckle.{/n} "But by our enemies is the glory of our lives measured, at the end of it all."

traits.locale_text: "Bir mühlet için. O köhne zeno unutmaz. Peşine düşecektir. Güçlü bir düşman edindin {name}." {n}Seberian, kuru bir kahkaha atıyor.{/n} "Fakat en nihayetinde hayatımızın şanı, düşmanlarımızla ölçülür."
